section.name: Shotgun info
section.description: Shotgun is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 using "Machine Gun", and at level 45, can be upgraded into "Pellet Shot" and "Dual Barrel".

section.name: Strategy
section.strategy:
- Shotgun has a very long bullet lifelength, it can damage targets from distance.
- Move vertically so ememies have less time to react to your shot.
- Get close to enemies before you shoot for a greater chance of killing.

content.section:
- Shotgun used to be an upgrade of Sniper aswell as Machine Gun before being removed.
- Shotgun had the same FOV as Sniper, before being only upgradable via Machine Gun.
